bamboo_grove.prompt: Mist parts around two roads through the bamboo. Lantern smoke curls from a paved trail, while older stalks groan deeper in the forest.

choices.label: Follow the paved road toward lantern smoke
Push deeper beneath the old bamboo

bamboo_grove.prompt: The paved road reaches a lantern toll. Merchants argue with armed collectors while herb crates wait in the rain.

choices.label: Settle the toll dispute before tempers flare
Guard the herb crates for a fair payment
Pressure both sides and take a hidden purse

bamboo_grove.prompt: Past the toll, a village apothecary begs for help sorting rain-soaked herbs before a fever ward runs dry.

choices.label: Sort the herbs by scent and qi flow
Sell the extra herbs before anyone notices
Carry the medicine through the crowded ward

bamboo_grove.prompt: Lanterns brighten at the village gate as a masked thief bolts through the market with a stolen spirit pouch.

choices.label: Chase the thief across the market roofs
Shield the stalls from the panicked crowd
Let the thief run and empty a noble's sleeve

bamboo_grove.prompt: The old bamboo closes behind you. Whispering talismans sway from cracked stalks, pointing toward a hidden spirit nest.

choices.label: Study the talismans before moving on
Raid the spirit nest and draw out its guardian
Leave incense and ask the grove for passage

bamboo_grove.prompt: Moonlight pools between ancient roots. A wounded grove fox laps at the water while a pearl-bright herb blooms nearby.

choices.label: Heal the fox before touching the herb
Take the herb while the fox is weak
Share clean water and wait for the roots to part

bamboo_grove.prompt: The nest shudders. A bamboo specter tears free from the roots and strikes back.
At the grove's heart, a bamboo specter rises from moonlit roots to test your intent.
A bloodied elder cultivator slumps against bamboo roots, whispering for help. His storage ring glints in the mud.

choices.label: Treat his wounds and share your qi
Strip his ring and leave him in the mud
Walk past without meeting his eyes

bamboo_grove.prompt: A young spirit beast thrashes in a hunter's snare, ribs heaving with pain.

choices.label: Cut the snare and guide it to safety
Harvest its core while it cannot fight back
Leave it tearing at the wire

bamboo_grove.prompt: A cornered spirit beast blocks the path. Villagers said it took livestock — its eyes are wild with fear.

choices.label: Slay it before it can strike
Circle wide and let it flee
Lure it away with herbs, then withdraw

bamboo_grove.prompt: Mist hides a crossroads. A moaning cultivator lies beside a resin trail; cold metal glints down the other fork.

choices.label: Follow the resin scent to aid the fallen
Loot the corpse by the cold metal trail
Wait for the mist to clear without interfering

bamboo_grove.prompt: A translucent specter drifts between the bamboo stalks — it lunges!
Leaves rustle overhead as a grove stalker drops into your path.

ashen_cliff.prompt: A rival cultivator from another sect lies bleeding after a beast attack, begging for a pill.

choices.label: Share a healing pill and guard them until help arrives
Finish them and loot the body
Bind their wound, then take their sect token as payment

ashen_cliff.prompt: A disciple in torn robes offers you a blood-stained manual if you swear silence.

choices.label: Drag them to the nearest sect for judgment
Accept the dark manual and their secret
Trade rumors only — keep your hands clean of their crime

ashen_cliff.prompt: Bandits emerge from cliffside smoke, shaking down a family of miners for spirit stones.

choices.label: Stand between the bandits and the family
Pay them off with your own stones and flee
Join the bandits and split the miners' haul

ashen_cliff.prompt: Trapped miners hammer on stone below a collapsed shaft. Ore glitters beside a shaky support beam.

choices.label: Grab the ore and leave them to dig out alone
Brace the shaft and haul the miners up first
Leave before the ceiling gives way

ashen_cliff.prompt: A cliff raider blocks the narrow pass, blade drawn.
Ash swirls into a wraith that shrieks down the cliff face.

moonwell_ruins.prompt: Beneath a fallen pillar, an elder gasps for breath — a jade manual case beside him.

choices.label: Stabilize him with your qi and guard the case
Take the manual case and slip away
Sneak past while he cannot stop you

moonwell_ruins.prompt: A young moonwell beast is chained in corrupt qi, tearing at its own fur.

choices.label: Break the chains and carry it to clean water
Harvest its spirit core while it is bound
Leave it chained in the ruins

moonwell_ruins.prompt: A cracked guardian statue turns toward you. Offerings lie at its feet — someone still tends this shrine.

choices.label: Bow and leave a sliver of qi as tribute
Shatter the core and steal the ore within
Circle wide without touching the offerings

moonwell_ruins.prompt: Moonlight reveals a hidden pool. A childlike spirit watches from beneath the surface.

choices.label: Drain the pool for power, heedless of the spirit
Skim lotus from the edge and thank the spirit
Probe the depths with qi, risking its home

moonwell_ruins.prompt: Moonlight coalesces into a phantom that strikes without warning.
A ruin sentinel awakens, stone fists grinding to life.

mistwood_village.prompt: A starving refugee begs for herbs outside the village gate, a child clinging to their sleeve.

choices.label: Share your herbs and qi without asking payment
Demand their family heirloom for a single herb
Walk past the child without a word

mistwood_village.prompt: A traveling herb merchant offers a rare bundle. A poor acolyte behind you cannot afford even one stem.

choices.label: Buy the bundle and gift half to the acolyte
Haggle until the merchant turns the acolyte away
Decline politely and leave the acolyte empty-handed

mistwood_village.prompt: The village well hums with faint qi. Locals warn that draining it will blight next season's crops.

choices.label: Drink deeply despite their pleas
Sample a sip and leave the rest for the village
Heed the warnings and walk on

mistwood_village.prompt: The night watch asks you to help patrol the forest edge — bandits have been taking travelers.

choices.label: Join the patrol and shield the road
Bribe them to look away while you slip into the woods
Slip away — not your village, not your fight

mistwood_village.prompt: A thief darts from an alley — steel flashes in the mist!
A root sprite bursts from a garden bed, thorns bristling.

verdant_depths.prompt: A lost disciple stumbles from the pines, delirious — they mutter their mother's village name.

choices.label: Guide them back toward their mother's village
Search their storage ring while they cannot resist
Leave them to wander deeper into the forest

verdant_depths.prompt: A massive pine blocks the trail. A wounded courier is pinned beneath a branch, resin seeping from the trunk.

choices.label: Harvest resin before lifting the branch off them
Heave the branch free, then take only fallen resin
Detour around and leave the courier calling for help

verdant_depths.prompt: A spirit deer watches you from the undergrowth, unafraid — hunters' arrows still in its flank.

choices.label: Approach with open palms and draw out the arrows
Strike while it is calm and claim the antlers
Watch from cover until it bleeds out

verdant_depths.prompt: An ancient boundary marker pulses with warning qi — a pilgrim kneels before it, praying for safe passage.

choices.label: Bow beside the pilgrim and offer a sliver of qi
Shatter the marker for the ore inside
Circle wide and leave the pilgrim to their fate

verdant_depths.prompt: Branches snap — a forest stalker drops from the canopy!
A thornback brute charges through the undergrowth, tusks gleaming.

cursed_swamp.prompt: A traveler sinks in the bog, reaching for your hand — their pack is already underwater.

choices.label: Pull them free with a qi rope
Take their pack and leave them to the bog
Watch from solid ground until they stop calling

cursed_swamp.prompt: Will-o-wisps drift over black water, luring a lost merchant toward the deep.

choices.label: Follow the lights and loot what the merchant drops
Anchor the merchant's qi and lead them to shore
Retreat to higher ground without warning them

cursed_swamp.prompt: A half-sunken shrine offers a dark bargain — power for a price whispered in your bones.

choices.label: Accept the shrine's dark blessing
Burn incense and attempt to purify it
Flee before the whisper names your loved ones

cursed_swamp.prompt: Pearls glint beneath the surface — a fisher family pleads with you not to stir the leviathan below.

choices.label: Dive for pearls despite their warnings
Hook pearls from the bank and share half with the family
Mark the spot for the family and withdraw

cursed_swamp.prompt: Murky water erupts as a bog lurker lunges for your legs!
The swamp itself rises — the **Swamp Hollow King** emerges, crown of bog iron gleaming!
